system.description: By pouring this dust into a cup of water and then drinking it, the imbiber may shoot sparks from their fingertips. The sparks act like torches and can be telepathically controlled by the drinker: they can move up to 20m/round, to a range of 100m, and can even go under water. The drinker must beware: if they are subjected to any fire damage, they take an additional 4d6 damage. The sparks last for 1d6+3 turns.
